list.name: Medical Events
list.rawQuery: SELECT date::timestamptz as time, end_date::timestamptz as timeend, title as text, category || ' — ' || COALESCE(subcategory, '') || ': ' || COALESCE(description,'') as tags FROM events WHERE $__timeFilter(date::timestamptz) ORDER BY date

description: Compact lab results overview — 106 biomarkers with inline sparkline trends.

links.title: Health Timeline (detailed)
links.tooltip: Open the full health timeline dashboard

targets.rawSql:
WITH last_vals AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (metric) metric, value, time::date AS last_date
  FROM samples
  WHERE document_id IN (SELECT id FROM documents WHERE subject IN (${subject:sqlstring}))
  ORDER BY metric, time DESC
)
SELECT
    m.name AS "Name",
    m.unit AS "Unit",
    COALESCE(
      (SELECT array_to_json(array_agg(s2.value ORDER BY s2.time))
       FROM samples s2
       WHERE s2.metric = m.name
         AND s2.time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 year'
         AND s2.document_id IN (SELECT id FROM documents WHERE subject IN (${subject:sqlstring}))),
      '[]'
    ) AS "Trend",
    lv.value AS "Last",
    lv.last_date AS "Last Tested",
    CASE
      WHEN lv.value IS NULL THEN NULL
      WHEN rr.ref_high IS NOT NULL AND lv.value > rr.ref_high THEN 'H'
      WHEN rr.ref_low  IS NOT NULL AND lv.value < rr.ref_low  THEN 'L'
      WHEN rr.ref_low IS NULL AND rr.ref_high IS NULL THEN NULL
      ELSE 'OK'
    END AS "Status",
    m.description AS "Description"
FROM metrics m
LEFT JOIN reference_ranges rr
    ON rr.metric = m.name
    AND rr.range_type = 'standard'
    AND rr.sex IS NULL
LEFT JOIN last_vals lv ON lv.metric = m.name
WHERE m.category = 'Complete Blood Count'
ORDER BY m.sort_order

list.name: subject
list.label: Dataset
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT subject FROM documents ORDER BY subject

title: Lab Results Overview
